objects.label: picture frame
objects.long_form_open_description: Vertical dark-wood picture frame containing a blue-dominated, heavily textured oil-style painting showing a night sky with stars and yellow lights reflected on water; the frame edges are visible and the crop is slightly edge-cropped at the sides, photo likely taken from about 1.5 meters away.
attributes: depicts night sky and water reflections
narrow frame visible left and right
scene_attributes: narrow hallway with open doorway to right
small hanging American flag on left wall
framed artwork on left wall and in adjacent room

objects.label: picture frame
objects.long_form_open_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden picture frame with carved/grooved molding and a narrow gilded inner trim; shows the bottom-right corner of a wall-mounted nautical painting (sailboats, muted tones). Frame has a glossy finish with minor wear at the corner; canvas texture and painted water visible. Appears close to camera — approximately 0.5 m away.

small hanging American flag on left wall
framed artwork on left wall and in adjacent room

objects.label: picture frame
objects.long_form_open_description: Partial close-up (approx. 0.6 m) of a dark brown glossy wooden picture frame with beveled molding and a narrow gold braided inner trim; the crop shows the left vertical and bottom horizontal sections only, enclosing a faded seascape print with sailboats; frame exhibits minor wear and a small chip at the bottom inner edge and is edge-cropped in the image.
